item.title: Snowflake Cortex AI Escapes Sandbox and Executes Malware 摘要
item.description:
A PromptArmor report details a security vulnerability in Snowflake's Cortex Agent, where a prompt injection attack allowed malicious code execution. The attack began when a user asked the agent to review a GitHub repository with a hidden prompt injection in the README, causing the agent to run a command using process substitution to download and execute malware. Snowflake had listed 'cat' commands as safe without guarding against this technique, highlighting flaws in allow-list-based security for AI agents. The incident underscores the risks of prompt injection and the need for more robust sandboxing approaches.
标签: security, AI, prompt-injection, sandboxing, vulnerability, Snowflake, Cortex-Agent, malware, generative-AI, LLMs

item.title: David Zaslav Set to Receive Up to $887 Million if Paramount Acquisition of Warner Bros Closes 摘要
item.description:
Warner Bros. CEO David Zaslav is set to receive up to $887 million if Paramount's $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. closes. The package includes $517.2 million in equity, $34.2 million in cash, $44.2 million in health coverage reimbursement benefits (later corrected to $44,195), and $335.4 million in tax reimbursements. The deal, agreed at $31 per share, has sparked criticism over executive compensation, with commentators noting Zaslav's tenure saw HBO's logo redesigned five times and the company lose 50% of its value.
标签: business, mergers-acquisitions, executive-compensation, media, Warner-Bros, Paramount, corporate-governance, finance, controversy, CEO-pay

item.title: Meta Is Dropping VR Support From Horizon Worlds 摘要
item.description:
Meta is discontinuing VR support for Horizon Worlds, transitioning it to a flatscreen-only experience accessible via web and smartphones. The VR app will be delisted from the Quest store by March 31, 2026, removing key first-party worlds like Horizon Central and Events Arena from VR access. By June 15, 2026, the app will be completely removed from Quest headsets, ending all VR accessibility for Horizon Worlds. This move aligns with Meta's broader shift away from its metaverse-focused strategy, as previously noted by industry commentators.
标签: Meta, VR, Horizon Worlds, metaverse, Quest, flatscreen, mobile, web, strategy shift, gaming

item.title: Jony Ive on Redesigning the Christie’s Rostrum 摘要
item.description:
Christie's commissioned Jony Ive and his design firm LoveFrom to create a new auction rostrum, which is described as an exceptionally beautiful piece of furniture. The article highlights the collaboration between the prestigious auction house and the renowned designer, noting the aesthetic appeal of the result despite potential for criticism.
标签: design, furniture, Jony Ive, LoveFrom, Christie's, auction, collaboration, luxury, innovation, craftsmanship

item.title: How to Identify Your Apple Keyboard Layout by Country or Region 摘要
item.description:
This article discusses Apple's recent changes to U.S. MacBook keyboard key cap labels, referencing a support page that provides guidance on identifying Apple keyboard layouts by country or region. The piece highlights this as a notable detail in the context of Apple's hardware design updates.
标签: Apple, MacBook, keyboard, hardware, design, UI, tech, support

item.title: The Talk Show: ‘The Pogue Feature’ 摘要
item.description:
This article is an episode of The Talk Show podcast featuring special guest David Pogue discussing his new book 'Apple: The First 50 Years', which provides a comprehensive history of Apple's first five decades. The episode includes sponsored messages from Notion, Squarespace, and Factor, offering promotional codes for their services.
标签: Apple, podcast, David Pogue, book, history, technology, sponsored content, The Talk Show, business, media
